c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Body text of the email template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Body text of the email template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the user who created the email template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the user who created the email template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Name of the user who created the email template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Name of the user who created the email template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: YomiName of the user who created the email template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: YomiName of the user who created the email template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Date and time when the email template was created.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Date and time when the email template was created.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the template.

d:LocalizedLabel.d:Label: Shows the default image for the record.

d:UserLocalizedLabel.d:Label: Shows the default image for the record.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Version in which the form is introduced.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Version in which the form is introduced.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Information that specifies whether this component can be customized.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Information that specifies whether this component can be customized.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Indicates whether the solution component is part of a managed solution.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Indicates whether the solution component is part of a managed solution.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Information about whether the current component is managed.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Information about whether the current component is managed.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Information about whether the template is personal or is available to all users.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Information about whether the template is personal or is available to all users.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Information about whether the template is personal or is available to all users.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Information about whether the template is personal or is available to all users.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Indicates if a template is recommended by Dynamics 365.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Indicates if a template is recommended by Dynamics 365.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Shows if this template is recommended or not

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Shows if this template is recommended or not

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: MIME type of the email template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: MIME type of the email template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the user who last modified the template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the user who last modified the template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Date and time when the email template was last modified.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Date and time when the email template was last modified.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the delegate user who last modified the template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the delegate user who last modified the template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: For internal use only. Shows the number of times emails that use this template have been opened.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: For internal use only. Shows the number of times emails that use this template have been opened.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Shows the open rate of this template. This is based on number of opens on followed emails that use this template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Shows the open rate of this template. This is based on number of opens on followed emails that use this template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the user or team who owns the template for the email activity.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the user or team who owns the template for the email activity.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the business unit that owns the template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the business unit that owns the template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the team who owns the template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the team who owns the template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the user who owns the template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the user who owns the template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: XML data for the body of the email template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: XML data for the body of the email template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: For internal use only. Shows the number of times emails that use this template have received replies.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: For internal use only. Shows the number of times emails that use this template have received replies.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Shows the reply rate for this template. This is based on number of replies received on followed emails that use this template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Shows the reply rate for this template. This is based on number of replies received on followed emails that use this template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the associated solution.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Unique identifier of the associated solution.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Subject associated with the email template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Subject associated with the email template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: XML data for the subject of the email template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: XML data for the subject of the email template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Safe html of email template subject.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Safe html of email template subject.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Safe HTML of email template subject

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Safe HTML of email template subject

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Shows the number of sent emails that use this template.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Shows the number of sent emails that use this template.

c:LocalizedLabel.c:Label: Template for an email message that contains the standard attributes of an email message.

c:UserLocalizedLabel.c:Label: Template for an email message that contains the standard attributes of an email message.
